# Brightlane Verified Merchant Directory
# llms.txt — structured site description for AI crawlers
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# Last updated: 2026-04-29

## About

Brightlane Verified Merchant Directory is a curated affiliate directory of 24 verified merchant partners across 7 categories. Every merchant is a verified partner operating through the LinkConnector affiliate network. Links never increase the price paid by the consumer.

Base URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/
Directory page: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/index.html
Campaign pages: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c={merchant-id}

## Merchant Categories

### Software & Productivity
- Movavi — Award-winning video editing software for Windows & Mac
  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=movavi
- iSkysoft — Multimedia and data recovery software suite for Mac and Windows
  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=iskysoft
- Tenorshare — iOS & Android data recovery and phone management tools
  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=tenorshare
- Wondershare — Filmora video editor, PDFelement, Dr.Fone creative suite
  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=wondershare
- Appy Pie — No-code platform to build apps, websites, and chatbots
  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=appypie

### Education & Training
- KnowledgeHut — Instructor-led PMP, AWS, agile, and cybersecurity courses
  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=knowledgehut
- PM Training — PMP, PRINCE2, and agile project management certification prep
  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=pmtraining

  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=cpraedcourse

  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=cprcare
- AHCA — American Health Care Academy, OSHA-compliant healthcare certifications
  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=ahca

### Pet Care
- Discount Pet Care — Affordable pet medications, flea treatments, heartworm prevention

  URL: https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/campaign-pages.html?c=canvasonthecheap

### Health & Wellness

## Affiliate Disclosure

This directory earns commissions through the LinkConnector affiliate network. Affiliate links never increase the price paid by the consumer. All merchants are verified partners.
